title: Arcane Release Manifest
description: Build metadata and breaking-change boundaries used by Arcane release tooling and update checks.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor validation.

revision.description: Git revision used to build this release.

buildTime.description: UTC timestamp for when this release was built.

breakingChanges.description: Versions that require a manual update when crossed from an older release.

version.description: The release version where the breaking change starts.

message.description: Optional user-facing markdown explaining the manual update requirement.
